heading: Provisions applicable to amendments
label: 2109 Provisions applicable to amendments
notes: Amendments1991—Subsec. (b)(1). substituted “subsection (b) or (c) of section 2107” for “section 2107(b) or 2107(c)”.Pub. L. 102–2371990— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The provisions of this chapter applicable to orders shall be applicable to amendments to orders.”Pub. L. 101–624
amendments: Amendments1991—Subsec. (b)(1). substituted “subsection (b) or (c) of section 2107” for “section 2107(b) or 2107(c)”.Pub. L. 102–2371990— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section read as follows: “The provisions of this chapter applicable to orders shall be applicable to amendments to orders.”Pub. L. 101–624

children.heading: Provisions applicable to amendments to orders
children.label: a Provisions applicable to amendments to orders
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), the provisions of this chapter applicable to orders shall be applicable to amendments to orders.

children.heading: Approval of amendments by cotton producers and importers
children.label: b Approval of amendments by cotton producers and importers

children.text: with respect to an amendment referred to in subsection (b) or (c) of , the amendment is approved by producers and importers of cotton as provided in such section; orsection 2107 of this title
with respect to any other amendment, that the amendment is approved by a majority of cotton producers and importers subject to the order voting in the referendum.

children.heading: Disapproval of any amendment to order not deemed to invalidate such order
children.label: c Disapproval of any amendment to order not deemed to invalidate such order
children.text: The disapproval of any amendment to an order issued under this chapter shall not be deemed to invalidate such order.
